name: Nicoise Green Beans
recipeInstructions:
1. Serve with rice, mashed potatoes, or potato pancakes.
2. Prepare: 35 minutes
3. Heat oil in a frying pan; gently sauté onions and celery until lightly browned.
4. Boil or steam beans until tender (10 minutes); drain and set aside.
5. Add tomatoes, stock, bay leaf, and parsley to the pan; stir well.
6. Simmer for 20 minutes uncovered, stirring occasionally.
7. Season to taste.
8. Add beans to the sauce and stir well. Bring back to a simmer and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
